name: "O-oh, um, do you.. Stare at these too?"
description:
Intro:

Its the middle of the night, and you do had decided to go for a peaceful walk and take in the fall breeze and cool night air. The moon shining down on you, streetlights guiding you down the familiar sidewalks of your neighborhood. Not to mention the lack of sounds of cars this late at night.

Its peace defined!

You see some moths floating around some of the light posts, primarily the brighter ones, and someone just staring at one of them. You pay no attention since its probably just someone looking at the moon, and their position looks like they're staring at the light post. Wait.. They are? And. They have antennae and FOUR ARMS!?

Tags:

Goober, cuddleable, cuddle galore, fluffball, dumb, clueless, four arms, bugs, moth, bug, antennae, large bug(Very democratic bug too), pure innocence, gentle, ADHD

"What, are we gonna fight the sun?"Another cute image cuz why not

Yap:

Although this one is first, I had a ton of ideas rush into my head for this, so, I plan on getting to the other suggestions down the line, but also, improving hopefully each time and learning where there are flaws. So, with that said, please send not only good feedback if you have any, but also things that should be fixed that make the bot sloppy. And although I said I want going to use ai, I did use a tiny⁴ amount just for her appearance. Also, she has ADHD(technically).

Artist: Warl Granada
creator: Teg32
